title: OFBT Canonical-Vocabulary IRI Cache
description: Phase 0.7 SME deliverable per ROADMAP. Per-vocabulary offline cache of canonical IRIs. The lint-arc.js IRI-existence check reads these caches to validate that every ARC-entry IRI resolves to a known IRI in the corresponding canonical release. Edge-canonical: cache is checked-in JSON; refresh is offline (scripts/refresh-vocab-cache.js consumes a user-supplied .owl/.ttl path).

vocabularyId.description: Stable cache identifier matching the filename (sans .json). E.g., 'bfo-2020', 'iao', 'ro', 'cco-2.0', 'prov-o', 'ofi-extension'.

namespaceURI.description: Base URI for IRIs in this vocabulary. Note: BFO and IAO share the OBO Foundry namespace (http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/) but are separately versioned and live in separate cache files; the iriPattern field discriminates.

iriPattern.description: Regex matching IRIs that belong to this vocabulary. Used by the linter to route an arbitrary entry IRI to the correct cache (an entry referencing http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000050 routes to bfo-2020 by pattern, not by manual tag). Anchor with ^ and $.

version.description: Canonical release identifier (e.g., '2020' for BFO, '2024-11-01' for IAO release date, 'commit-abcdef' for CCO snapshot). Tracked here so retrieval freshness is visible at lint time.

retrievedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the cache was last refreshed from canonical sources, or null for hand-seeded entries (Phase 0 initial state). The SME is responsible for refreshing pre-Phase-4.

sourceURL.description: Canonical retrieval URL (informational — refresh-vocab-cache.js reads from a local file path supplied by the SME, not from the network, per edge-canonical principle).

entries.description: IRIs known to exist in this vocabulary. Sorted alphabetically by iri to keep diffs minimal across refreshes.

iri.description: Full URI form (no angle brackets, no CURIE). Internal canonical form per behavioral spec §4.2.1.

type.description: OWL entity type. The linter uses this to flag ARC entries declaring a property IRI that resolves to a class (or vice versa).

label.description: Optional rdfs:label. Informational only; not load-bearing.

deprecated.description: True if the canonical release marks this IRI deprecated. ARC entries pointing at deprecated IRIs are warned by the linter.

unverified.description: True if the IRI was hand-seeded from secondary sources (e.g., the relations catalogue) and has NOT yet been confirmed against the canonical .owl/.ttl release. The linter flags ARC entries pointing at unverified IRIs as still-pending in strict mode. SME refreshes the cache against the canonical release to clear this flag.

seedSource.description: Provenance for hand-seeded entries — typically the catalogue row or spec section the IRI was extracted from. Cleared on first canonical refresh.
